CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Bifurcation
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS JOHN PADRON, TERESITA PADRON and FLORENTINA LAURENTE'S Motion For bifurcation, as to liability and damages is denied without prejudice to making the motion to the trial judge. The trial judge, not a pre-trial judge, is in the best position to evaluate the pertinent factors necessary to fairly adjudicate this motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
